title: From Oil to Food, the Iran War Is Squeezing the Global Economy
summary_full: The effects of the war in Iran are squeezing consumers, businesses and governments around the world, raising the prices of many essential goods.
summary_public: The effects of the war in Iran are squeezing consumers, businesses and governments around the world, raising the prices of many essential goods.
